movesList.name: Scream Shield
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, To, Up, To

movesList.name: Ancient Axe
movesList.input: Aw, AD, To, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Hell Grinder
movesList.input: charge Aw (1 sec), To + Y or Z

movesList.name: Hell Fire
movesList.input: hold B or C, Dn, TD, Up

movesList.name: Axe Trip
movesList.input: Aw, TD, AD, push B or C

movesList.name: Shield Crack
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Up, Aw, Dn

movesList.name: Axe Lift
movesList.input: hold B or C, Up, AU

movesList.name: Roll
movesList.input: To, TD, AD, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Demon Axe
movesList.input: charge B or C (2 secs), TD, To

movesList.name: Corpse Striker
movesList.input: charge Dn + Y or Z (2 secs), Up, TU
